title: agrostis humbertii
intro: Agrostis humbertii, also known as the grass of the genus Agrostis, is a type of cool-season grass that is native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Agrostis humbertii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues. Agrostis humbertii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional remedies and tonics to treat various health conditions.
